title: View file Info on mobile app
excerpt: On the desktop/browser version of monday.com, you can open any file (from gallery, updates, col, etc) and within that popup there will be an ‘Info’ tab that shows some basic metadata about that file (upload date, creator…

posts.author: maxb (max brinton)
posts.cookedHtml:
On the desktop/browser version of monday.com, you can open any file (from gallery, updates, col, etc) and within that popup there will be an ‘Info’ tab that shows some basic metadata about that file (upload date, creator, etc).

image3242×1666 203 KB

Is there any way we can get the same Info details into the mobile app UI? Right now the only options are to delete the file, or open it in the native IOS or android file viewer which won’t include date uploaded into monday.com or the uploader.

image1170×2532 138 KB
